name: rubric/enforce-file.sh (§29.6 byte-identical write-time engine) applies orchestrator-emitted rules to files matching their linguist_aliases (proves URL→rule→enforcement chain end-to-end)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r14-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Prefer const in TypeScript source

All TypeScript files SHALL use const for variables not reassigned.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml </dev/null; echo 'let x = 1;' > $OUT/sample.ts; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file $OUT/sample.ts --root $OUT/out 2>e.err; grep -qE 'rules_checked=[1-9][0-9]*' e.err && echo write-time-enforcement-applies-emitted-rules 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
